channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Celebrate Filipino Culture with Jodi, Diether, Vhong, and More
item.description: The article highlights ABS-CBN's Throwback campaign, which celebrates the 'Jologs' phenomenon—a cultural movement in the Philippines where people embrace their youthful, carefree days. It features col...

item.title: NMB Bank Recognized as Tanzania's Top Supporter of SMEs in Euromoney Awards
item.description: NMB Bank Plc has been named Tanzania’s Best Bank for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) at the Euromoney Awards for Excellence 2026, highlighting its role in supporting businesses that drive tr...

item.title: Kim Kardashian pays tribute to her late grandmother Mary Jo Campbell
item.description: Kim Kardashian has expressed deep sorrow following the death of her grandmother, Mary Jo 'MJ' Campbell, who was a significant figure in the Kardashian-Jenner family. The TV personality shared a heartf...

item.title: Kabi WaJesus and Milly WaJesus Discuss Workplace Dress Code
item.description: Kabi WaJesus and Milly WaJesus sparked online debates after he advised his wife against wearing crop tops at their warehouse workplace. In a video shared on social media, Kabi questioned Milly's choic...

item.title: Tuchel's tactical struggles and Argentina's Messi-driven dominance define England's World Cup exit
item.description: Thomas Tuchel faces intense criticism after England's semifinal defeat to Argentina at the 2026 World Cup, though his tactics were not the sole reason for the loss. The article highlights how Argentin...

item.title: Pauline Hanson's European Trip Exposes Internal Struggles and Political Missteps
item.description: The article critiques Pauline Hanson's recent European trip, highlighting her reliance on blaming others for her political shortcomings. It argues that her decision to tour England and a Mediterranean...

item.title: Eastern Africa Leaders Push for Regional Collaboration on Climate Resilience Funding
item.description: Meteorological authorities across Eastern Africa are urging enhanced regional cooperation and sustainable funding to strengthen early warning systems against escalating climate disasters. A high-level...

item.title: DFA Condemns AI-Generated Video Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys, Demands Removal
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) of the Philippines has demanded that China Daily remove an AI-generated video that depicts Filipinos as monkeys, calling the content racist and dehumanizing. Th...

item.title: Nigeria's Prison Reforms Target Overcrowding with Focus on State Offenders
item.description: Minister Olubunmi Tunji-Ojo revealed that 93% of Nigeria’s inmates are held for state law offences, while only 7% are federal offenders. He highlighted reforms to decongest prisons by releasing those ...

item.title: Priyanka Chaturvedi urges Centre to remove Union Education Minister, says students deserve credit for demanding accountability
item.description: Shiv Sena (UBT) leader Priyanka Chaturvedi has called on the Central government to remove Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan, arguing that such a decision would demonstrate accountability in ...

item.title: A Culinary Delight: Ontario Lavender Risotto Recipe
item.description: This article presents a refined risotto recipe featuring Ontario lavender, leeks, and blue cheese, crafted by Susan Hay and Chef Massimo Capra. The dish highlights the delicate balance of flavors achi...

item.title: Rep. Massie advances transparency bill to address Epstein file disclosures
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) and Rep. Ro Khanna (D-CA) are promoting an amendment to their previous Epstein Files Transparency Act (EFTA) to further investigate the Trump administration's handling of Jef...

item.title: Innovative Camera Technology Enables 3D Tracking of Invisible Particles in Scientific Research
item.description: A groundbreaking advancement in imaging technology has been developed by scientists at ETH Zurich, introducing a novel camera system capable of tracking invisible particles in three dimensions. This i...

item.title: Nollywood actor becomes LASTMA Special Marshal to boost road safety
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actor Yinka Quadri has been officially appointed as a Special Marshal by Lagos State Traffic Management Authority (LASTMA) to support road safety initiatives. The induction ceremony ...

item.title: Andy Murray to retire from professional tennis after career highlights
item.description: British tennis legend Andy Murray has confirmed his retirement from professional tennis, marking the end of a storied career that included three Grand Slam titles and a historic Wimbledon victory in 2...

item.title: U.S. Tightens Visa Rules for International Students and Journalists
item.description: The Trump administration has implemented new visa regulations that limit the duration of F visas for international students, J visas for cultural exchange visitors, and I visas for journalists. Under ...

item.title: Young rider fined for speeding on Canberra highway after police stop
item.description: A 22-year-old motorcyclist was caught speeding on the Monaro Highway in Canberra, Australia, and faced legal consequences. Footage from a police body camera shows the rider, on a black Yamaha R3, was ...

item.title: Delhi High Court Issues Notice on Sharjeel Imam's Bail Plea in 2020 Riots Case
item.description: The Delhi High Court has issued a notice to the Delhi Police regarding the bail plea filed by student activist Sharjeel Imam in the larger conspiracy case linked to the February 2020 Delhi riots. A be...

item.title: Corruption and Controversy Behind the FIFA World Cup's Glitter
item.description: The article delves into the dark underbelly of FIFA's World Cup, exposing decades of systemic corruption that has tainted the tournament's legacy. It traces the origins of FIFA's transformation from a...

item.title: Christopher Nolan Discusses His Oscar Win, 'The Odyssey,' and New Puppy
item.description: The article details an in-depth interview with Christopher Nolan, focusing on his recent Oscar win for 'Dunkirk,' the production of his new film 'The Odyssey,' and his personal life, including the ado...
